...app.page.anonymousMarketplacesFillUpW: Anonymous marketplaces fill up with scams. Curated ones fill up with deals. On Shouks, every member — buyer or seller — clears the same bar before they're let in. No bots, no burner accounts, no guessing who's real.
...app.page.bidLiveInOpenAuctions: Bid live in open auctions, or grab fixed-price listings straight away.

...app.page.buyAndSellWithPeople: Buy and sell with people who actually care.

...app.page.decideWhoGetsInApplications: Decide who gets in — applications, invite codes, or referrals.
...app.page.everyMarketplaceIsCuratedApp: Every marketplace is curated. Apply once, and you're part of a community where listings are real, prices make sense, and members have been vetted.
...app.page.everyMemberGetsTheSame: Every member gets the same vetting. That's what makes the listings worth something.
...app.page.everyShouksAccountCanBrowse: Every Shouks account can browse communities you love and run one of your own. No second signup, no switching apps.
...app.page.findThePeopleWhoKnow: Find the people who know what you're looking for.
